name: Login with invalid credentials
description:
As a user, I want to be able to log in to the application
  so that I can access my personalized dashboard.
descriptionHtml:
As a user, I want to be able to log in to the application
so that I can access my personalized dashboard.
statusMessage:
CRITICAL ERROR: Not on the Login Page!
Expected Title: Automation Exercise - Signup / Login
Actual Title: 
Actual URL: https://automationexercise.com/login
Reason: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //img[contains(@src,"logo.png")]' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
statusTrace:

	at stepdefinitions.Login.the_user_is_on_the_login_page(Login.java:23)
	at ✽.the user is on the login page(classpath:features/Login.feature:8)
